api.description: Optimized for DeepSeek's OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint and current V4 models.
api.profileDescription: Save one or more DeepSeek keys and switch the active profile used by chats.
api.modelDescription: Choose the model for chat generation.
api.legacyWarning: Legacy alias — switch to deepseek-v4-flash or deepseek-v4-pro before July 24, 2026.

deepseek-v4-flash.label: DeepSeek V4 Flash
deepseek-v4-flash.description: Default choice for responsive chats and roleplay.

deepseek-v4-pro.label: DeepSeek V4 Pro
deepseek-v4-pro.description: Use for heavier reasoning, coding, and complex writing.

api.savedDescription: Custom model ID from saved profile.
api.generationDescription: DeepSeek V4 supports long context and optional reasoning depth.
api.temperatureHint: Controls output randomness. 0 = deterministic, 1 = maximum creativity. Recommended 0.7-1.0 for roleplay.
api.maxTokensHint: Maximum tokens to generate per response. Leave blank or 0 for model default.
api.streamingHint: When enabled, AI responses appear word-by-word. When disabled, the full response appears at once.

toast.apiKeyRequired: Please enter your DeepSeek API key first.
toast.modelsEmpty: No DeepSeek models returned from API

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose your color scheme. Changes apply instantly and are saved for restart.

context.title: Context Tokens
context.description: Max token budget for chat history. Messages are trimmed from oldest to newest until the budget is met. Set to 0 for unlimited.
context.tokenEstimate: Token estimation uses ~4 chars per token. Actual token count depends on the model's tokenizer.

regex.title: Regex Rules
regex.selectOrCreate: Select a preset or create one

deletePreset.title: Delete Regex Preset
deletePreset.description: Delete "{{name}}" and all its rules? This cannot be undone.

toast.secretUnlocked: 🔓 Secret unlocked! Check the writing preset.
